 "cells": [
  {
   "metadata": {},
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "source": "# Tutorial 17 - extract_sequence_overview",
   "id": "eb99b08b466378dc"
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Step 0: Setup the project and prepare the data"
   ],
   "id": "102dff6ed840c830"
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-13T20:58:03.386995400Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-13T20:58:02.911024300Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "from pathlib import Path\n",
    "\n",
    "import pydpeet as eet"
   ],
   "id": "79e029b8403acba3",
   "outputs": [],
   "execution_count": 1
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "We will use \"ERROR\" as the logging style for better readability of the notebook"
   ],
   "id": "7464f69370048fea"
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-13T20:58:03.397953200Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-13T20:58:03.388009300Z"
    }
   },
   "source": "eet.set_logging_style(\"ERROR\")",
   "id": "913f64d76d31c3ec",
   "outputs": [],
   "execution_count": 2
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-13T20:58:07.078655500Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-13T20:58:03.397953200Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "standardized_data = eet.read(\n",
    "    input_path=str(Path.cwd().parent.parent / \"res\" / \"raw_data_from_cyclers\" / \"Cal_Ageing_Checkup1.xlsx\"),\n",
    "    config=eet.ReadConfig.Neware_8_0_0_516,\n",
    ")"
   ],
   "id": "dca5318f3a5d9058",
   "outputs": [],
   "execution_count": 3
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-13T20:58:07.498855Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-13T20:58:07.080162400Z"
    }
   },
   "source": "segmented_data = eet.add_primitive_segments(df=standardized_data, config=eet.PrimitiveConfig.DEFAULT)",
   "id": "5c64b1e2951fbdbb",
   "outputs": [],
   "execution_count": 4
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": "## Step 1: extract_sequence_overview via a SequenceOverviewConfig",
   "id": "307081f795f22896"
  },
  {
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-13T20:58:07.524527400Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-13T20:58:07.500406900Z"
    }
   },
   "cell_type": "code",
   "source": [
    "config = eet.SequenceOverviewConfig.DEFAULT\n",
    "config.segment_sequence_config.keys()"
   ],
   "id": "acdaf9ccb765a3c9",
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "dict_keys(['Discharge_iOCV', 'Charge_iOCV', 'CCCV_Charge', 'Pause', 'CC_Charge', 'CV_Charge', 'CP_Charge', 'CC_Discharge', 'CV_Discharge', 'CP_Discharge', 'CRamp_Charge', 'VRamp_Charge', 'PRamp_Charge', 'CRamp_Discharge', 'VRamp_Discharge', 'PRamp_Discharge', 'I', 'V', 'P', 'Charging', 'Discharging'])"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 5,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    }
   ],
   "execution_count": 5
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "metadata": {

     "end_time": "2026-06-13T20:58:07.802350600Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-13T20:58:07.525865900Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "eet.extract_sequence_overview(\n",
    "    df_primitives=segmented_data,\n",
    "    config=config,\n",
    ")"
   ],

  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": "## Step 2: use a custom config via sequence_overview_config_wrapper",
   "id": "c2d3e4f5a6b7c8d9"
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-13T20:58:07.817231500Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-13T20:58:07.802350600Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "custom_config = eet.sequence_overview_config_wrapper(\n",
    "    segment_sequence_config={\n",
    "        \"CC_Discharge\": {\n",
    "            \"rules\": {\n",
    "                \"variable\": \"I\",\n",
    "                \"type\": \"Constant\",\n",
    "                \"direction\": \"Discharge\",\n",
    "            }\n",
    "        },\n",
    "        \"Pause\": {\n",
    "            \"rules\": {\n",
    "                \"type\": \"Rest\",\n",
    "            }\n",
    "        },\n",
    "        \"Discharge_iOCV\": {\n",
    "            \"loop\": True,\n",
    "            \"min_loops\": 2,\n",
    "            \"sequence\": [\"CC_Discharge\", \"Pause\"],\n",
    "        },\n",
    "    },\n",
    "    show_runtime=True,\n",
    ")"
   ],
   "id": "d2e3f4a5b6c7d8e9",
   "outputs": [],
   "execution_count": 7
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-13T20:58:08.095388Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-13T20:58:07.820288100Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "segments_and_sequences_custom = eet.extract_sequence_overview(\n",
    "    df_primitives=segmented_data,\n",
    "    config=custom_config,\n",
    ")\n",
    "segments_and_sequences_custom.head(6)"
   ],
   "id": "e2f3a4b5c6d7e8f9",
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "         ID        Sequence  CC_Discharge  Pause  Discharge_iOCV\n",
       "0.0       0            None             0      0               0\n",
       "9112.0    1            None             0      0               0\n",
       "11585.0   2  1_CC_Discharge             1      0               0\n",
       "29405.0   3            None             0      0               0\n",
       "29915.0   4            None             0      0               0\n",
       "29976.0   5            None             0      0               0"
      ],
      "text/html": [
       "<div>\n",
       "<style scoped>\n",
       "    .dataframe tbody tr th:only-of-type {\n",
       "        vertical-align: middle;\n",
       "    }\n",
       "\n",
